posts.author: emmanuelkatto24 (Emmanuel Katto)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I’m Emmanuel Katto from Dubai, United Arab Emirates (UAE), I’ve been working on creating an activity dashboard that pulls together specific notes, and I realized something important during the process. It would be really helpful if the “Search Everything” feature also included content from Monday Docs.

We initially thought that Monday Docs would be a great fit for our needs, but we ran into an issue when we discovered that “Search Everything” doesn’t actually search the content within Monday Docs. This has become a bit of a hurdle, as we need to be able to track and view those notes in an easy-to-read text format from the search results.

Has anyone else encountered this problem, or does anyone have suggestions on how to work around it? It would be a huge help to have a seamless search that includes Monday Docs content as well.

Thanks in advance for any tips or advice!
Regards
Emmanuel Katto
